prompt: He stands dynamic with one hand in his pocket, holding the edge of his coat with the other. The background is a minimalist, bright white studio cyclorama wall. The air is densely filled with hundreds of falling and floating black feathers swirling around him, creating a deep sense of motion. Shot on a professional 35mm lens, f/2.8 aperture, from a low-angle perspective to emphasize his stature and presence. Professional studio lighting with a strong overhead rim light creating a crisp highlight on his shoulders and hair, coupled with soft front-fill lighting to capture the details of his black clothing. High-contrast, sharp focus on the subject, while the feathers closest to the camera and furthest in the background display a beautiful, cinematic motion blur and shallow depth of field. Monochromatic color palette dominated by pure blacks, stark whites, and smooth greys. --ar 2:3 --stylize 250
